name: NAS Patuxent River
tagline: The Navy's flight-test and aviation R&D hub in southern Maryland, home of the U.S. Naval Test Pilot School.
_note: Navy aviation R&D / flight-test hub (Lexington Park, St. Mary's County, southern MD; on the Chesapeake). CONUS full template (BAH MHA MD135 Patuxent River; RentCast/SchoolDigger work). NAWCAD (Naval Air Warfare Center Aircraft Division), Naval Test Wing Atlantic, US Naval Test Pilot School. Heavy engineering/civilian/contractor workforce; most live off base. Medical: Naval Health Clinic Patuxent River. Facts verified from official sources (cnic.navy.mil NAS Patuxent River, Navy Medicine, DeCA/NEX, Wikipedia for corroborated headline facts). Maryland is TRICARE East. Medium-confidence flags: base coords (approx), off-base ZIP 20653 (Lexington Park).

data.Location: Lexington Park, MD (St. Mary's County, southern Maryland, on the Chesapeake)
data.Role: Naval aviation research, development, test, and evaluation
data.Major tenants: NAWCAD, Naval Test Wing Atlantic, and the U.S. Naval Test Pilot School
data.Setting: Rural-suburban southern Maryland on the bay

sections.title: Mission & Identity
data: Naval Air Station Patuxent River is the Navy's center for aviation research, development, test, and evaluation. It hosts the Naval Air Warfare Center Aircraft Division (NAWCAD), Naval Test Wing Atlantic, and the renowned U.S. Naval Test Pilot School, where aircraft and systems are put through their paces.

On the Chesapeake Bay in St. Mary's County, southern Maryland, it has a heavily engineering, civilian, and contractor workforce, giving the area a technical, settled, family-oriented feel with most people living off base.

sections.title: A Settled Tech Community on the Chesapeake

data.subtitle: Pax River is an R&D and test community with a stable, family-oriented feel. The main choice is which St. Mary's County town fits your commute and schools, with many families choosing to buy.
intro: Because the workforce is largely engineering, civilian, and contractor with longer tenures, the area feels settled, and many families buy. On-base housing is available; most live off base nearby.
Where you live mostly comes down to commute and schools across Lexington Park, California, and the surrounding St. Mary's County communities.

recommendations.advice: Lexington Park borders the base for the shortest commute and the most convenience.
California and Leonardtown are popular with families for schools, shopping, and newer neighborhoods.
On-base housing is available; weigh it against the settled local market where many choose to buy.
The Chesapeake means boating, fishing, and waterfront living are part of the lifestyle here.

sections.title: Gates & Access
data: Visitors without a DoD ID need a visitor pass and a REAL ID-compliant ID from the Visitor Control Center.
Gate hours and visitor requirements change, so confirm the current details on the official NAS Patuxent River site before you go.

sections.title: On-Base Housing
data: NAS Patuxent River has privatized on-base family housing across several neighborhoods, though most of the workforce lives off base in St. Mary's County.
Eligibility and availability vary by rank and family size, so start with the housing office for the current manager, options, and waitlists.

source.label: DoD 2026 BAH Rates, MHA MD135 (Patuxent River)

sections.title: Schools
data: There is no DoDEA district here; children attend the local civilian public schools. St. Mary's County Public Schools serves the area around the base.
Your assigned schools depend on your address, so confirm the campus for any neighborhood you are considering.

data.Care: Outpatient primary and some specialty care on base; inpatient, emergency, and complex care via regional network hospitals

intro: Whether to rent or buy is the biggest money decision of most PCS moves, and at Pax River the longer (often civilian) tenures and settled St. Mary's County market lead many families to buy.
rent: Your tour is short (about two years or less) or your orders feel uncertain.
You want time to learn the county before committing.
You'd rather not gamble on resale timing when you PCS out.
Your BAH comfortably covers rent in the areas you'd consider.
buy: You expect to be here three or more years, common at an R&D hub.
You want to use your VA loan and build equity instead of paying rent.
The stable St. Mary's County market fits your budget for a home you like.
You've found a neighborhood and commute you're confident about.
data.bottom_line: There is no universal right answer, but Pax River's longer tenures and settled market make buying worth a serious look. Run your BAH against the rent and home prices above, weigh your tour length, and talk to a lender and an agent who work with military families before you commit.

intro: The first month at a new duty station is mostly logistics. Knocking these out early makes everything else easier.

steps.title: Line up temporary lodging
steps.text: Book Navy Gateway Inns & Suites or a short-term rental before you arrive. You can claim Temporary Lodging Expense (TLE) for a limited number of days while you house-hunt.

steps.title: In-process and update DEERS
steps.text: Report to your command and finance, and make sure DEERS and ID cards are current for every family member so TRICARE and base access work.

steps.title: Start with the Housing Office
steps.text: Most of the workforce lives off base; get the housing office's read on St. Mary's County before you sign anything.

steps.title: Register your vehicle and sort access
steps.text: Handle base access and Maryland vehicle registration, and learn the visitor-pass process for guests. Bring your registration and insurance.

steps.title: Enroll the kids in school
steps.text: Contact St. Mary's County Public Schools early and bring records and immunizations.

steps.title: Set up healthcare
steps.text: Update your TRICARE enrollment so you can be seen at Naval Health Clinic Patuxent River or network providers.

data.a: It's the Navy's aviation research, development, test, and evaluation hub, home to NAWCAD, Naval Test Wing Atlantic, and the U.S. Naval Test Pilot School. The workforce is heavily engineering and civilian.
Mostly off base in St. Mary's County. Lexington Park is closest; California and Leonardtown are popular with families for schools.

data.q: Is it a good place to buy?
data.a: Often. Longer tenures and a settled local market make buying common at Pax River.
NAS Patuxent River is MHA MD135. Use the calculator above for your grade.
